headline: Has KLA (KLAC) Rallied Too Far After Its Recent Share Price Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether KLA's current share price lines up with its underlying value, this article walks through the key signals to help you frame that question clearly. KLA recently closed at US$1,768.78, with returns of 14.9% over 7 days, 24.7% over 30 days, 38.8% year to date, 166.0% over 1 year, 388.6% over 3 years, and a very large gain over 5 years. Recent attention on the broader semiconductor space has kept KLA on many investors' watchlists, as the company is often discussed in...

headline: KLA (KLAC) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: For the June quarter, KLA's results were strong across the board, and we were at or above the high end of our guidance ranges.  KLA's leadership in process control has put the company in a unique position at the center of enabling success for our customers to build out infrastructure to support artificial intelligence.  Prioritized investment to ramp AI capabilities has fueled growth at the leading edge across the semiconductor industry through more complex designs, faster product cycles, higher-value wafers and increased demand for advanced packaging.
